---
name: Enhancement
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing feature
title: "[Enhancement]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Sailok25
---

## Summary
A short, one-line description of the improvement.

## Current Behavior
Describe how the feature currently works.

## Proposed Improvement
Describe the improvement you would like to see.

Be as specific as possible. UI mockups, screenshots or examples are welcome.

## Expected Benefit
How would this improve usability, performance, or the overall user experience?

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any other approaches?

## Additional Context
Any other information, screenshots or references that might be relevant.
